course_title: APPLICATIONS OF BIOCHEMICAL GENETICS FOR GENETIC COUNSELORS
description: Comprehensive overview of clinical biochemical genetics through a systematic review of classic and rare inborn errors of metabolism (IEM).  Psychosocial issues are discussed as related to care of patients, and their families, with metabolic disorders.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Master of Genetic Counselor Studies

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Master of Genetic Counselor Studies
